intro: Wanna meet the side of yourself you never knew existed?
description:
“Your Hidden Side” Test is a game where you answer a series of questions by intuitively choosing from four options.

Based on your choices, it reveals your “unexpected personality traits” and “subconscious ways of thinking” that lie within you.

You may not show them on the surface, but your hidden qualities—such as cautiousness, boldness, sensitivity, or a laid-back nature—are presented in a clear and engaging way through the results.

It’s a fun way to reflect on yourself, with moments that make you think, “That’s so true!” or “I didn’t know I had that side!”

Enjoy it on your own at your own pace, or share and compare results with friends or during streams for a lively party-style experience.

Supports button controls, so you can also play in TV mode and tabletop mode.
